jobs.title: Attorney / Legal Expert (Real Estate / Energy) — AI Training Project
jobs.description: Apply your real estate and energy law expertise to improve AI legal reasoning. Review and annotate leases, easements, conveyances, and interconnection agreements. No prior AI experience required.
jobs.best_for: Real estate attorneys, energy lawyers, legal professionals

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer (TypeScript)

jobs.description: Apply frontier physics research expertise to train next-generation AI systems for scientific reasoning. Contribute across theoretical physics, quantum information, astrophysics, condensed matter, and more.
